notes: Merovingian King of Burgundy around 585 AD, noted for his piety and concern for church reform.

docs.title: Letter 13
docs.author: Guntchramn
docs.subject_summary: Guntchramn to Gregory on Frankish church reform
docs.excerpt: … Great Date: ~585 AD Context: The most pious of the Merovingian kings writes to Gregory about church reform in his kingdom — one of the few Merovingian rulers who took the church's moral concerns seriously. Guntchramn, king, to the most blessed Gregory.
